prompt: I feel lost and confused about my career.
I know what I should do, but I keep procrastinating.
I am afraid of failing, so I avoid taking the next step.
I am too attached to the outcome and it is making me restless.
I keep breaking my own routines and I do not know how to become more disciplined.
My anxiety keeps making small decisions feel overwhelming.
I get angry quickly and then regret what I say.
I feel jealous when I see other people moving ahead in life.
I am carrying grief and I do not know how to keep going.
I feel lonely even when I am around other people.
Everything feels uncertain and I cannot find steadiness.
I doubt myself even when I know I am capable.
I am searching for purpose, but nothing feels clear.
I feel burned out and emotionally drained by responsibility.
I have a difficult decision to make and my mind keeps going in circles.
My relationship is full of tension and I do not know how to respond wisely.
My expectations of other people keep leaving me disappointed.
Part of me wants one thing, but another part wants something completely different.
I want to trust life more, but I keep gripping for certainty.
I have been through setbacks and I want to rebuild my resilience.
